name: Crisp & Cool Middle Eastern Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss green pepper, tomatoes (or cucumber), and green onions in a medium-size bowl.
2. In a small bowl, combine yogurt, dill, salt, and ground pepper.
3. Spoon the yogurt mixture over the salad and toss.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
CHO: 7g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 1g; CAL: 44; Low-salt diets: Omit salt.
